scripts.build: pnpm run validate:content && pnpm run build:sitemap && pnpm run build:recording-kit && vite build
scripts.build:governance-fixtures: pnpm run validate:content && pnpm run build:sitemap && pnpm run build:recording-kit && vite build --mode archive-governance-test
scripts.preview:worker: pnpm run db:migrate:local && pnpm run build:governance-fixtures && wrangler dev --port 4173 --var TURNSTILE_MODE:test --var TURNSTILE_SITE_KEY:1x00000000000000000000AA --var TURNSTILE_SECRET_KEY:test-only --var EDITOR_API_KEY:test-editor-key
scripts.validate:secrets: wrangler secret list --format json | node scripts/validate-worker-secrets.ts
scripts.ops:verify: pnpm run validate:cloudflare && pnpm run validate:secrets && pnpm exec wrangler d1 migrations list nanjinghua-submissions --remote && pnpm exec wrangler deploy --dry-run && pnpm run performance:check
scripts.test: pnpm run test:unit && pnpm run test:e2e
scripts.deploy: pnpm run build && pnpm run performance:check && pnpm run validate:cloudflare && pnpm run validate:secrets && pnpm run db:migrate:remote && wrangler deploy
